name: verifyIdentity
label: Verify agent identity
description: Run the full Whisper-agent verification chain server-side for one IPv6 address (reverse PTR, forward-confirming AAAA / FCrDNS, DANE-TLSA pin, and the signed identity document) and return a single verdict: whether the address is a real Whisper agent, its canonical hostname, its operator/tenant, and the supporting evidence. Keyless.
